title: Not as good as rent the runway
text: I have been using Nuuly for about a year now. The biggest downfall is that they don’t care for their clothing very well. The cleaner that they use is very potent. I almost always put all of the clothes directly into the washing machine upon reciept. it takes about a week for it to arrive after ordering it. And you need to get it back to them in time. So it’s really not a monthly rental. Rent the runway has the best logistics and this is not even comparable. Nuuly arrives very wrinkled.. And sometimes the clothes are so misshapen or shrunken or damaged.  That being said, it is a collection of very good brands. So if you have the patience to iron and wash everything once you get it then it’s fine. But with the shrinkage, it is often that you can’t wear anything that you rented. And their customer service care to help you with that

title: Great Service, App is Buggy
text: Not sure what happened with these last couple of updates but the app is SO buggy now! Every minute or so, the four icons at the bottom (home, search, closet, bag) will disappear and I have to close the app if I want to get into my bag or something. Additionally, the screen will lag when I scroll and jump back up several swipes. Super annoying :/ I have a secure wifi connection and have never experienced this prior to the recent updates! But I will say, I love Nuuly so much and will continue to use it despite these bugs! The customer service is wonderful and they have a great selection of items. Also, student discount!

title: Great but UX needs work

title: Not with the time and money
text: At first I was very impressed by the selection and availability of the clothing, as well as the cost to buy from the box to keep the items I liked. However, I am becoming increasingly frustrated that the items I now want to rent are never available  in my size when it’s time to curate a new box. I wait days or hours for all the items to line up in my size or spend that same amount of time search for alternatives that also might suddenly not be in available in my size anymore once I’m ready to order. On top of this, the quality of the items is noticeably deteriorating while the prices to buy are increasing, and I no longer find it a “deal” to buy from the box. Due to these factors, I no longer find this service to be a value to me and my next box will likely be my last.

I’ve also started getting clothes that REEK and were obviously not washed. If I keep getting more bad boxes than good, I’m going to have to cancel because it’s a waste of my money.

title: WILL TAKE YOU MONEY!!!!

title: Love at first try-on
text: As soon as I tried on these cords I knew I was going to buy them. They fit like a glove, and can be dressed up or down. They are very flattering and super soft!

title: Limited stock
text: Been using Nuuly for 2 years now.   Pros : I love the idea and a lot of the pieces are aligned with my style. The shipping is fast and if you damage an item accidentally you don’t get charged. Customer service is good and they will generally give you a portion refunded or a bonus item if something is wrong with your order. I also like the thrift shop where you can get items greatly discounted (though I wish they had the option to filter the thrift shop by what was saved in my closet).   Now for the cons…  The biggest con is that the items I want are never available.  I can have 60 items on a list and only 8-10 be available consistently. There are items I have tried to rent for 2 years and it has not been possible. It leaves me making forced choices for the month and they not be truly what I wanted or needed, and then I end wearing them minimally, if at all. When I look at it that way it’s not worth the $100/month.   I don’t want to leave Nuuly but the lack of availability in items despite this being consistent feedback is disheartening. Another month of getting items I’m not really interested in and I think I will have to stop my membership.

title: Misrepresentation
text: They claim they’ll do the laundry for you while you get the choice. Most of their items are out of stock if they’re any good. A lot of their inventory is several years old and the clothes look like it when they arrive. And you will be doing laundry - the minute you unzip that bag, it will stink of everything from body odor to cigarette smoke or be covered in pet hair, pills, or damage. They do not do any laundry. I had this service for six months and each time I received my bag, I had to spend a day shaving pills, dry cleaning washing, lint, rolling, and ironing before I could even try these clothes on. They were in such bad condition or stank badly. Most were unbearable and had to stay in the bag zipped up tight for a month just to control the odors.

Now the customer service representatives won’t get back to me. Only one support person contacted me just to literally say hello. There is no phone number listed either. And the drop down menu for FAQs and customer service doesn’t work!! When I would tap to see my subscription history and billing, it would just say my next billing date. The software on the customer support side is really terrible. TLDR: rental service is good, but not worth it compared to horrible customer service.

title: Love Nuuly!
text: I love this app, just wish there was a category “newly added” To make sorting through clothes easier. I do love the service. Thank you!

title: If you are skinny it's awesome
text: I am not skinny. I can wear between sizes 8 and 12 and have one of those bodies where not every thing looks great.   With nuuly, you get 6 items. On average 1 fit weird and 1 was damaged or faded. That meant I was really getting four items a month.   If you ride in, they will usually give you a credit for an extra item the following month but what would be better is if they sent a replacement item.

title: Amazing incredible stunning gorgeous
text: Truly amazing!!! I’ve been subscribed for a little over two years now and I love it! They’ve got a wide variety of options, styles, and types of items to rent. The discount on the buying feature is pretty sweet too :) The items I receive are always in great condition and well kept. Anytime I’m going on a trip to a new place, I use Nuuly to get the perfect outfits to have a great vacation!   I just got my most recent order and none of the options fit me due to my own weight fluctuations since recovery/treatment. I messaged for help and got a quick response from Marianna. She was very helpful, kind, and helped me solve this problem, (A problem that had nothing to do with Nuuly). She refunded me for the month and I got to redo my order to get the right sizes <3   Again, truly incredible service, people, and clothing!

title: Award winning coat

title: Nope
text: I went into this with high hopes because I’ve heard a bunch about how great it is. No. It’s not. I spend 100 something dollars on this and I placed my order yesterday to then go look today and see that TWO of my items have been replaced with other items I did not want. I think this is ridiculous, why is it that I’m paying 100 dollars for them to go into my order and take away the things I want and replace them with things I don’t want. It’s unfair. I wouldn’t recommend if you have a specific event you are ordering for. I had a concert in a week and now I have to search for a new outfit and waste more money because they did this without a warning.

title: Not Clear
text: They allow you to PAY and then add stuff to your cart, but allow other people to rent those items while they are in YOUR cart. title: Downhill
text: Nuuly used to be my go to. I have been using it for years. It used to be reliable and most items came new or in like new condition.  Now, it is rare that I get a Nuuly package without a complication, whether it be a missing item, replaced item, stained item, or completely worn out old item. My most recent shipment came with one replaced item and two stained items, leaving me with only three of six items.  Customer service always refunds me $17, which I appreciate. But when I’m relying on certain pieces for special  events or vacations, this makes for a huge last minute “NOOO what am I going to wear” fiasco.  Then I have to do last minute shopping, sometimes doing overnight shopping costs, etc, just to get at item in time for my event or vacation. Just to update, as I received a reply. I always contact customer service, and they do offer refunds. But it is the hugest hassle to order and be short an outfit, CONSISTENTLY. Now when I order, I think “hmmm I wonder what item they will substitute out or what item will arrive damaged, etc”. I have little confidence in receiving a perfect order. If this continues, I will end up cancelling for good.

title: Never sizes

title: BRING BACK NEW ARRIVALS

title: Love/hate relationship
text: I love getting to choose from super cute clothing each month, it has eliminated my precious fast fashion shopping habits!  The downside is the quality at times is really poor and typically each box has at least one damaged item (stained, holes, missing piece).  Initially the customer service was great and always made sure the situation was resolved.  However, month after month I’m starting to feel bad and feel like a Karen, but disappointed when 1/6 items is unwearable due to damage.  Also the customer service more recently does the bare minimum, such as mailing missing parts but not offering any discount or refund.  I love this company but am getting more and more frustrated each month.

title: Truly Excellent & they go above and beyond!

Most recently they returned my AirPods which I accidentally mailed back in the pocket of one my items. I thought they were a lost cause and didn’t bother to reach out. Then one day I got a package in the mail which a little handwritten note and my AirPods!! So sweet and kind and I am so so grateful!! Really fantastic team

title: Not Size Inclusive
text: I’ve been a Nuuly subscriber for just over a year now. I like the service the delivery is fast however, recently like most people my body has changed sizes, now I’m a larger size (8/10) and not a size 2/4. whenever I go to rent anything they don’t have it in my size. I do not suggest the subscription if you’re larger than a size 6, because the items that you inevitably fall in love with, will not be available for you to rent when it comes time.   Summary; The difference in item availability is dramatic and noticeable for “larger” women; not size inclusive because of the lack of availability    Tip: sort by available now in your closet  Con: watch your heart get crushed by your favorite items not be available.

title: Scam, was charged for 4 additional months even after canceling multiple times
text: Beware, YOU MUST CANCEL THROUGH NUULY.COM NOT THE APP. I REPEAT CANCELING THROUGH THE APP DOES NOT “COUNT”. Even though there is the option to cancel subscriptions through the app, there is shady fine print in the terms and conditions that require all cancellations to be made on the website. This is what the nuuly representative (Gillian) sited to me when I was inquiring as to why I had been charged for an additional 6 months of subscription services despite canceling three times. Gillian refunded me two months, but said because of the terms and conditions regarding cancellation, I cannot get a refund for the other 4 months despite having cancelled through the app with the appropriate window of time. Ridiculous.

title: The Substitution system makes it not worth it
text: after you place your OVER ONE HUNDRED DOLLAR ORDER, they will randomly swap items for other random items without your consent, and you won’t find out until it’s already shipped.  Like truly items that I have never seen, weren’t even saved to my closet, and are kinda just plain ugly will show up at my door. This has happened 2 months in a row. To be expected to pay $100 a month and possibly not even receive the items you’ve ordered is outrageous.  Why would you not notify the subscriber and ask them what item they’d want to swap for?? For example: last month I ordered JEAN SHORTS and they swapped it for a FLEECE SWEATER. It’s august.  Waste of money, INCREDIBLY frustrated.

title: Availability problems

title: poor user experience & nothing in stock
text: the actual app experience is not great. trying to find your size is hard because they don’t let you filter by jean size. for example, i know what my size is in levi’s jeans (28, 30, etc) but i can’t search by that. i can only search by 2, 4, 6, etc. you also can’t filter out maternity items so oftentimes i will filter by what’s available and in my size and get a bunch of pieces for pregnant people or in sizes that doesn’t actually fit me.  as of 2024, nothing is every in stock! if i filter my list of 300 pieces to show what is in stock, it reduces to 70, but of that 70, 67 of the items are winter wear i added last season. stop allowing new members until you can figure out how to keep seasonally appropriate clothes in stock for you current members!!!!

title: Some hits, some misses, Quality Control issues
text: I’ve been using Nuuly for a few months now and overall, I’d say I’m pleased. Since it’s all internet shopping, I’m happy if I like at least half the items in my box each month. I will say, it can be very difficult to discern the hand of the fabric and how things will actually fit, even with reviews, for some items. I think having fiber content and measurements for items could potentially be helpful. In my last box, I received a dress with a bleach stain on the front. My sister, who also uses the service, received an “oversized” wool cardigan that been run through the wash. It was completely felted and tiny. So I think their quality control could really use some work. I will say 1. I have also experience similar issues with other, similar services.  and  2.  upon contacting Nuuly, they refunded me for the item and gave me a free item for the next month, but I would have preferred a replacement item.   BUT, I still generally like the service as I get to try items I would not otherwise be able to afford or want to fully commit to.

I will definitely continue to use nuuly after I have worked out the kinks!!

title: Fantastic Rental Service (and Plus Size Friendly)
text: Nuuly is the only rental service I’ve kept more than 2 months. I’ve used them for almost a year now, and don’t foresee cancelling any time soon. They continually add pieces to their site, and provide soooo many plus size options that are current and well made. As a larger girl, it allows me the opportunity to try new things without buying them first and in the comfort of my own home. This has drastically cut down on random clothing spending, and allowed me to make intentional purchases. Minimal effort return is a bonus, and so it their wonderful customer service team. Any time I have reported an issue, they have responded promptly and kindly (and usually with a credit back to my account even when I didn’t think it necessary). 10/10 recommend.

title: Amazing company

title: Flawed System
text: I really wanted to like Nuuly because it’s a great idea in theory however I experienced sooo many issues. Most recently, I ordered two dresses hoping to wear one for an event. One of the dresses was replaced due to “inventory issues” and I was sent a completely different dress as a replacement. When Nuuly needs to send you a replacement, they don’t consult you they just choose something random and send it… The second dress came in missing the slip so I couldn’t wear either dress!   One of the bigger issues are their prices for buying. You can buy used items but the discounts are insulting… 12% off for an item that has been worn by 100 people 🫠 I found the sweater I rented online at dilliards and that sweater was cheaper (brand new) than the used version at Nuuly. They don’t price match so your choice is to spend more for used or save money and purchase elsewhere.   The only redeeming factor for Nuuly is their customer service reps are suuuper kind! They try to be as helpful as they can but they can’t always fix everything when the platform as a whole is flawed :(

title: Not For Me
text: The app works pretty good, but the messaging is confusing if you click out of it.  I had a hard time getting back in, so I had to email my rep instead.  This service though, is not for me.  Think about those rental bowling shoes you gave to wear when you go howling.  This service is very much akin to that.  The clothes comes with a Nuuly smell/perfume and a cringy worn feeling.  The pieces I received were well worn, and while rewashing them with a free and clear/frangrance free detergent helped, some pieces still needed a lot of additional help with ironing and steaming and still probably won’t wearable.  It’s in an interesting idea, but I think if you actually want people to purchase the items, the company has to make them wearable out of the bag (they should clean and iron and steam the clothes and should at least feel like new).  Also they need to cap items at a certain amount of rental usage and retire them to their thrift shop.  I was going to try again with “new arrivals” but it’s just too much of a gamble.  I recommend saving your money and skipping it!  One more thing - they wanted to charge me slightly more/ about the same for a used white shirt, than what anthropology was selling for at brand new.  (Anthro has it on sale) Definitely do your research… same with a free people jacket… it’s on sale and costs less than buying a used item.  Just because it’s discounted, they might be on sale elsewhere!  Keep that in mind.  And if you do proceed, you’ve been warned!

title: Proceed With Caution
text: I am disappointed with my Nuuly experience. Things started off great with my first box, got everything quickly and it fit perfectly (i did research outside of the app to have the best shot at this). Everything has been TERRIBLE since. My second order NEVER made it to me, it returned to the warehouse or something. The only reason i got a refund is because i contacted them. After explaining what had happened they offered me one free item and refunded the box cost. This is where I get really frustrated, i went to reorder my items that i had spent way to long selecting and they weren’t available, the best they could do was tell me approximate return dates for the items, ranging from a couple of days to weeks. Yesterday I finally saw most of the items i wanted in sizes that could work and now I am getting an email saying they are subbing one of my items with something that looks NOTHING like it. I wasn’t given a choice to pick another item and this item wasn’t even from my save closets, there for money wasted. Worse still is that there isn’t an option to alert them that you aren’t interested in the item. If i want a surprise i would ask my dad to go by me some pants. All of this to say proceed with caution, the time spent is probably not worth the effort if this is the experience and customer care being offered.

title: A few snags
text: Overall I like the concept and the price is very reasonable for what you get. I'm on my second month of rentals so I don't have much experience with this company but there are a few things to be wary of.   First, if an item in your cart isn't available they switch the item out for you. They do give you an extra credit to use on a future order, but it's still frustrating that they don't give you the option to pick back ups or make the switches yourself. I got stuck with items with poor reviews and didn't fit because they swapped my items. Hopefully in the future they'll change that feature, so you can either choose a replacement, or it'll pick from your closet instead of a random item.   Second, they aren't very clear on when you have to return your items. You have to return them before you can get your next order but they don't specify a specific date. This may lead to unexpected purchases of the items and means you don't truly have the items for a full month (more like 3 weeks when you consider shipping times). Ideally it would be a roll over date when your next rental starts so that you actually get your items from the 1st to the 1st. Or at least tell the user what day is the last possible date for returns.   Overall, I'm satisfied but with a few minor changes it would be a lot better.

title: Horrendous customer service
text: I’ve been a Nuuly member for years now. The actual service and idea is amazing. I usually do love the items themselves. However, the customer service is atrocious. The people responding are nice enough. But it’s like nobody ever works. The response times for the online chat are FOR-EV-ER. Like HOURS.  Sometimes even DAYS. It’s like, why even have an online chat option?? Just only allow emails then!  Also, they have screwed me a few times in getting a shipment later than I was promised, or forgetting to send part of a clothing item (like a belt that’s supposed to come w it and the item doesn’t even nearly fit without it), or somehow realizing they don’t have the item i picked after confirming shipment—so they decided on THEIR behalf what to send me in place of the item i wanted instead of asking ME what I would like (ps the item they chose was NOTHING i would ever in my life wear which was incredibly frustrating). And then they “can’t” send only one item out when they were the ones who screwed up, so they do give you a little bit of money back or a free spot for the next month which is i guess nice but doesn’t necessarily make up for their mistakes. So, it depends how flexible you are and if you use this service because you actually have a busy social life or travel a lot, etc, or if you’re just doing it for fun.

title: Loved these
text: These were fabulous. I was wanting to try bibbs without purchasing first- this was best way to do it! Ended up buying them.

title: So cute!
text: Love this. Long length. Which I love. Bought it!

title: It’s okay…
text: The concept for this is great, but the execution is not the best. 10/10 for the clothing options, they really do have a variety and everything is stylish. However, there are some problems. 1. If you order something that the app said was in stock but the item was actually out of stock, they just send you a random item with no say in what it is. So in reality you’re only getting 5 items that month. 2. The first month they ship you you’re items very fast. Every month after that is takes 1 to 2 weeks to get your items. So you can only really wear the items for 2 weeks before you have to send it back. I essentially go through two billing periods for every 1 shipment. They say it’s “2-day shipping”, but that’s two days of actual shipping. It takes them 3-7 days to fulfill your order and you get another few days with your “label created” but your items have no actually shipped. I still have the service because I like to keep my closet fun. But overall, not a product I’m super enthusiastic about. If your on a budget, this is not a money saver in any way.

title: Dirty Clothes
text: My second nuuly box smelled like body odor. The source was one dress in particular. The armpit smelled horrible. The dress has obviously not been washed after the previous renter returned it.  There is also fabric tape on the thigh slit from the previous renter. The FAQ section ensures the cleaning of every item. The quality control obviously needs work.

title: Absolutely not worth it!
text: Returned my nuuly a day before my billing date to try to cancel it, was told I needed to return 2-3 days before my billing date to actually cancel and not be charged for the next cycle. It took almost a week before the last nuuly was unlocked and typically takes that long before you receive it, so you’re basically paying for 2 weeks of clothes. I’ve received multiple items missing buttons or clasps and very, very worn looking. Not worth it!!

title: Love Nuuly!
text: App is very easy to navigate.

title: Loved this so much I bought it!!
text: Loved it! Perfect size, cozy and cute!

title: Super soft, love the color
text: This sweater is surprisingly soft and the purple color is beautiful! I’ve gotten a lot of compliments on it and decided to buy it. it is definitely very cropped (I’m 5’2 ) and you still get a tummy glimpse even with high waisted

title: Love the app but shipping takes a long time
text: I love this service and the app is very user-friendly and easy to navigate. My New Year’s resolution for 2022 was to not buy anymore new clothes. I’ve been doing Nuuly since December 2021 so after a full year, i only have one complaint. I took off a star because of how long shipping takes. Be prepared to wait at least a week between when you choose your items and when you actually receive them. This means you really only have the clothes for three weeks at a time, not a full month. I really wish they utilized a 2-day shipping service (I realize overnight shipping may be asking too much lol). Just as an example, I made my selections for this month and got confirmation of those items on 12/4. I received the shipping notice & tracking info on 12/7 and the items are set to be delivered 12/12. It’s the same every month so if you sign u, just know to expect a one-week turnaround time between monthly shipments. I had no clue how long it would take when I first joined.

title: the best jeans!!!

title: I absolutely love my experience with this app!
text: I was stuck in a rut of wearing the same boring jeans and t-shirts every day, but it was tough for me to get out of my comfort zone to buy new things. This app gave me the confidence to try out clothes that were out of my comfort zone and I have since purchased a ton of new, fun clothing items at a discount! I always look forward to my monthly delivery of clothes.

title: Makes my life fun and easy!
text: I get so many compliments on my outfits and the fact my style is always fresh. As a mom of 5 who also owns a business and loves fashion -but has limited time to shop- Nuuly keeps me feeling stylish and up to date!

title: Solid app, great clothing, BEST customer service out there!
text: There are still some feature enhancements that would be helpful like ‘notify me when my size is back in stock’ or a way to email a new return label from the app (you currently need to go to customer service despite the FAQ saying you can do this from your account > rental history). But overall, the experience is solid!  The best part of Nuuly is their customer service team! They are SO helpful and quick to respond. They even follow up with you if you haven’t responded to make sure your issue is resolved! 🫶🫶🫶

title: Not able to log in with email
text: I never provided my phone number and am able to log in via browser with my email. Doesn’t seem like that on option on the app, bummer.

title: A lot of potential

I would say only about 30% of what is shown is actually available to rent. I go most months pausing my subscriptions because most of the things i’m interested in are not available

title: Nuuly Changed My Life!
text: I know it sounds so cheesy, but it’s true. I try to avoid single wear items in my closet which lead to me purchasing a lot of staples and feeling like I was always wearing the same thing.   That has completely changed since I joined Nuuly a year ago. I am constantly renting items I wouldn’t buy (as I only wear them once) and I’m trying new styles that might be out of my comfort zone. The Nuuly community also leaves such helpful comments so you have a good idea whether or not items will actually fit.  You won’t regret this one!!

title: Great communication
text: There is always someone in contact when you have questions, and they are very welcoming! This is a great business!

title: The clothes are fun but..
text: The clothes and the quality of the clothes is great. This is a great alternative to RTR for more casual clothes. But beware if you live outside the NYC area, you’re paying for a monthly subscription but only get to keep your clothes for three weeks before you have to send them back “to get the most out of your subscription”.

title: Good idea, not ready for prime time
text: I really enjoyed the clothes on the service and the ease of renting, but had so many issues. First, they sent me damaged clothes and couldn’t send me a non-damaged version of the same item. They also only gave me one extra item on my next order which didn’t help me at all when I needed the item for a wedding that weekend. Next, they just lost one of my orders. When they found it, they said I had to re-order everything and never contacted me about it. I had to keep following up with them. Their customer service is not even trying to save business seemingly because they have so many issues all of the time. Again, I think this concept is a great idea, but they haven’t quite figured out how to make it work.

title: Obsessed But Would Love Exact Measurements
text: I literally love Nuuly. I’ve been able to try new clothes, and update my closet monthly!  I do have one request. Renting pants can be a hassle because every brand has their own sizing. Every rental I read reviews and order the size I think will work based off of that. Unfortunately, it’s still a 50/50 shot if the pants will fit. I even bought a measuring tape and tried to look up each brands exact measurements, so I could be informed. I’m still experiencing sizing issues.  I would love it if Nuuly displayed exact measurements for every size in each pant, so I can measure myself and pick the correct size based off an objective measure and not subjective reviews.  Thank you Nuuly for creating a really cool service! I do love updating my closet frequently, and not contributing to fast fashion in the process.

title: Cozy and Cute
text: This sweater is so comfy, stylish, and warm. I also love that it isn’t itchy like some sweaters are. Seems like the sweater has held up well to multiple wearings, so it’s a keeper!

title: 12/10 Do yourself a favor!!

title: Don’t want to take it off!

And when my 22 year old son I looked good in it. That was it, I had to have it. I am 56 and if thinks it works for me. Then that’s a big sold for me!

title: Poor customer service, buggy website, ratty clothing
text: I need to update my credit card information and despite there being nothing wrong with my credit cards (confirmed with visa rep) their website continually pops up with a faulty error message stating that it cannot accept my payment details. Their customer service is basically non-existent. There is no phone number to call and talk to someone. You can only text/chat and wait for them to message you back. I messaged them 10 hours ago during their business hours to resolve this issue and they have not even read my text let alone responded to it. Also, I’ve only received one shipment so far and one of the dresses looked soooo old. It was pilling, the seam was coming apart at the bottom, the color was faded and the belly area was all stretched out. I cannot believe they sent me a piece of clothing in that condition let alone were asking $80 to buy it. I feel like it was wasted money. I almost forgot…almost half the items in my closet are not available to rent in my size…really not cool. So far I haven’t had the best experience with this company.

title: Loving it!!!!
text: I had an upcoming trip to a tropical place and thought it’d be a good idea to try a clothing subscription, since most of the clothes I’d take with me would not be used where I live.   Nuuly has a very competitive price point compared to other companies -  You get to choose 6 pieces of clothes  for a month for under $100 (including taxes)! I’m overall very happy with the clothing/brand selection they offer, though I noticed there aren’t many black tie outfits, if that’s what you’re looking for. I was mostly happy with the fit of my pieces (2 were on the larger size but I made it work - I was aware that they would be a little loose). I reviewed an item that I didn’t end up wearing because, to me, it looked super faded. CS reached out and made things right - I wasn’t expecting anything from my review, as I knew it was a possibility with a rental company, but their proactive response made my experience even better. I’m now looking forward to using Nuuly during fall/winter months, as their selection of coats/blazers is amazing! In all honesty, my experience with Nuuly made me rethink my approach with buying clothes: I now buy basic/versatile/durable items and rent trendier ones. I also loved that they deliver the clothes in a ziper bag as opposed to a box - a step further into a more sustainable business.  Thank you for offering a great service at an amazing price!

title: Love the service app needs work

Suggestions for pieces that would complete an outfit; eg if a top is shown with a specific pant, show similar pants available to rent to complete the outfit

title: Love this service, excited to see how it grows
text: I love this service. It has really helped me curtail my clothing spending, and I’m excited to get my box each time. The service, the process, the clothes - all top notch! I have a few small suggestions that I think could be done to improve the in-app experience itself: 1) A scrolling progress bar. Sometimes I’m scrolling and scrolling and unsure where I am in the options (25%? 90%?!). 2) A way to queue up what I would like to pick for my next box. The closet is great but just holds everything you ever ‘like’. I’d like a way to narrow it down in sort of a staging area. (In addition to ‘My Closet’, maybe a ‘My Fitting Room’?). 3) Preventing the app from refreshing on its own. Sometimes even if I leave it up in the background and want to come back, it’ll refresh and lose where I’ve been scrolling and I have to start all over.  Like I said, I really love this and am excited to continue using it. These are just small suggestions to continue to build on an awesome app and service. :)

title: App could be more user friendly

title: On my second month… great so far!
text: Make sure you read how it works!   I had misunderstood how Nuuly works, and had only sent back 3 of my items. I assumed you could keep a few and rent new items so long as you kept your subscription going. Well you can’t. You can only keep all 6 items, or send back all 6 and get an entirely new set of 6 items. You can’t keep a few, exchange a few, etc. If you decide to keep any items then they charge you as they assume you are purchasing the items. It is however at a discounted price.   I did not want to purchase, I simply did not understand how the service worked (definitely my fault for not reading their service description in detail). Luckily they were super quick to respond and helped me to correct that within 24 hours. I did have to send the other 3 items back and pay for shipping, but they were lenient and understanding and I did not have to pay for the items!   I have only done one subscription thus far, but I would highly recommend this company! Of the 6 items I rented, 3 of them were brand new with tags attached and the other 3 were lightly used. It’s a fun way to try new items, especially items that you wouldn’t purchase otherwise. I’m going on my second subscription and just rented 8 items for a big trip I’m doing. Loving the styles, the variety and how many items you can get! Perfect for fashion lovers like myself!

title: I hated it

They informed me I can’t do that and need to send all the 6 back and had strict rules that they don’t give you another label and will charge you for the items you kept longer. Ridiculous concept for renting clothes as the whole point is to keep renting if some don’t fit. Bad customer service being cheap about sending another label. Cancelling immediately!

title: Customer service needs work
text: I LOVE this concept! And I love the clothes that were sent to me. Only downside is their customer service. They offer three ways to get in touch with them (chat via the website, phone call, or email). I chose email (which said a response would come in 2-3 business days) the first time and never received one, even after a week. When I went back onto the website to attempt to contact them again, it looked like instead of an email it was a chat which I didn’t see because I closed out the website. I gave them the benefit of the doubt, thinking maybe I clicked the chat button by mistake. So then I selected phone call (which said a response would come in one business day). It’s been 3 days and no response via email, phone, or chat. Again, love the concept of renting as it’s more “green” and love the clothes. Customer service just needs some work. title: Best clothing rental
text: I’ve tried the competition, and I’m about to list all the reasons nuuly is superior.  1.their customer service is top notch. I had an issue one time about one item that arrived with a very small hole in it. They refunded me for the item in the box and put an extra spot in for the next month. All within a six minute response on their chat.  2. You get ALL the items for your month in one shipment, and you send it all back in one return. I couldn’t believe when I bought a competitor’s box with 8 items, they only sent four at a time and then you had to send all four back after two weeks to get your next four. If you want to send two back and hold on to two, you only get two replacements. This equals less money worth with the competitor and less time for wear. Nuuly gives you the max time and money.  Plus it’s less trips to drop off for shipment back saving time too. 3. Brand selection. I was so surprised to see funky brands like selkie, farm rio, ragged priest,  Lisa says gah, and sister Jane. I’m a colorful person so it’s nice to see such a vast variety in mid to higher end clothing.  4. Sustainability. There was ZERO throwaway packaging besides the label itself. It was shipped in a large canvas bag that I was even able to use for my week long getaway trip as luggage! Amazing!  5. Prices to buy. If you choose you like something in your box and want to buy it to keep it, it’s 10-60% retail! It’s a really good deal for many items.  6. Quality and clean. All the clothing I’ve rented has been quality and clean. I appreciate that such eye for detail is met. That way even though it’s used and I'm renting, it still feels new to me when I open it up!

title: Never loved an app more
text: When I say I love Nuuly, I truly mean it. The positives to this membership are endless, greatttt deal for high end pieces that you can wear everyday, often even better deal if you decide to purchase at the end of the month, honest reviews on all products, a balanced selection of unique pieces like none other, and so many more. It has completely elevated my confidence. I don’t know why the whole world isn’t subscribed. Thank youuuuu Nuuly.

title: Great for college students, but be aware it’s a clothing RENTAL
text: This app is freaking amazing for young women. New arrivals are added almost every single day. If you are okay with renting re-used clothes this app is great for you, if you are not, don’t rent from them. All the clothes I have received so far have zero signs of wear, but I am aware that they might come with light wear. If you want brand new clothes this is not the app for you.

title: better than supporting fast fashion
text: Lighter on the pocket than buying new clothes when the clothes you have stop fitting your spirit before they stop fitting your body. Bonus that it’s also lighter on your closet which can now just hold everdat staples and lighter on the climate.   The clothes nuuly picks are not just daring, they are often tasteful in unexepected ways, and I find them to be way more flattering and sexy in person. The photographers tend to down play the sex appeal for many of these peices.   Nuuly’s spirit is boldly feminine while still saying, “hey, yeah, respect the words that our coming out of my mouth.”

title: Nuuly anytime, anywhere
text: When I’m out and see a cute outfit, I can now quickly see if Nuuly has something similar that I can just rent! I love having the nuuly app for the convenience and practicality. The app is intuitive and works seamlessly with the web version. Thank you Nuuly mobile team!

title: Amazing
text: App is beautifully laid out, and very easy to use. Everything I need, I can easily find and search for

title: 5-star clothing rental app!
text: I love renting my clothes from Nuuly and their app makes it even easier! I use it to build my shipments, quickly review the stuff I’ve rented, and add new styles to my closet for future rentals. Highly recommend this service (and the app!) for anyone who wants to wear new clothes all the time without spending a fortune.

title: Easy and fun to use
text: This app adds a layer of fun to browsing and adding items to your closet. I love that you can swipe right on the smaller photos while browsing to see the additional photos. I also love the way the phone vibrates when I’ve added an item to my closet. Overall easy and intuitive to use!

title: Perfection for clothing rental!
text: I’ve been using this service for a long time and I love it! This app is the thing I’ve been waiting for! So happy to be able to post reviews directly from my camera roll, share screenshots & links with friends, and obsessively add things to my closet instead of spending down-time on other apps on my phone. Love the ability to easily scroll through product and swipe it down once done looking. Great job team!

title: Love Nuuly and evening easier now with the app!
text: Easy to use - intuitive and functional. Especially great for posting reviews!!!
